title: Output validation — checking the AI's response meets the required format
verdict: PASSED — all hard checks clear; one soft finding (retry/13.9 named-and-deferred three times instead of once, but never taught).

format_discipline.notes: First non-empty line is H1 title. Meta sidecar present and valid. Six sections in correct order.

length.notes: 951 words within [800,1200]. 951/200=4.76 min rounds to 5, within [4,6].

citations.notes: [1] cited 7 times inline. All three bibliography entries matched by inline markers.

findings.detail: topic 13.9 (retry) is named-and-deferred three times: line 147 (code comment), line 152 (Step 4 prose), line 176 (Key Takeaways). Scope rule permits named-and-deferred 'at most once'. None of the three occurrences teach retry — all are bare pointers. Soft finding only.

forward_references.notes: No forward reference teaches future material. Three defer pointers to 13.9 exceed the 'once' convention but do not constitute scope_creep.

faithfulness.notes: All 10 sampled assertions trace directly to corpus sections 4, 5a, 5b, 5c, 5d, 7, 8. No fabricated claims detected.

beginner_readability.notes: All non-everyday terms defined on first use with bold-term/plain-meaning shape. Analogies precede abstractions (form-filling analogy in Overview, ordering-form analogy in Key Concepts). No hedging language found. Sentences are short and active.

formatting.notes: No paragraph exceeds 4 sentences. Worked Example uses numbered steps. Code snippets appear inline next to each concept in Key Concepts. All term definitions use bold-term pattern.

assessment_references.notes: No assessment IDs, due weeks, or grade weights appear in the reading. Corpus §4 contained an A4 reference but it was correctly excluded from the reading.

scope.notes: Reading stays within output-validation-only boundary. Pydantic (mentioned in corpus) correctly omitted. Retry (13.9) only named-and-deferred, never taught. No material beyond the topic title is explained.

soft_findings_summary.detail: 13.9 (retry) named-and-deferred 3 times (lines 147, 152, 176); convention is at most once. Not a quality blocker — no retry logic is taught.

escalation.reason: No scope_creep found. Checks 5-6 produce 0 distinct hard findings. Soft findings total: 1, below the ≥3 escalation threshold.

gold_example_check.notes: No gold example found in .claude/references/gold-examples/reading/. Standards applied from artifact-mix.json and SKILL.md.
